memory.summary: My roommate's lack of hygiene and the resulting odor are severely disrupting my focus and sleep, but they seem friendly. Relocating to the library today is necessary to restore my ability to work.
Moving to the library restored my focus for work, but it only addresses my immediate needs. The underlying hygiene issue remains unresolved, meaning I will still face sleep disruption tonight.
Moving to the library successfully restored my focus, allowing me to make significant progress on the reading response despite the unresolved roommate hygiene issue.

I made good progress on the reading response, but my roommate's return means I must now decide whether to address the hygiene issue directly or let it pass tonight.
Addressing the odor directly worked well; my roommate apologized sincerely and promised to act immediately, resolving the conflict without damaging our relationship.
I successfully advanced the reading response to 82% while resolving the roommate conflict, leaving me with sufficient runway to finish tomorrow despite feeling slightly stressed.
I resolved the roommate conflict and advanced my reading response to 87%, but I still have a sleep debt of 2 hours and low energy.
I made small progress on the reading response, but my energy is critically low and stress remains high. I need to prioritize sleep immediately to prevent burnout.
I advanced the reading response to 94% with a runway remaining, but my zero energy and high stress indicate I must stop working now.
I nearly finished the reading response, but my zero energy and high stress confirm I must stop working immediately to avoid burnout.
The reading response is now complete, so I can finally stop working and address my critical sleep debt to recover from burnout.
